_comment: Service-level and process-level timeseries tiles. These use $Service and $PGI variables. All DQL verified against working Manufacturing dashboard.

requests_total.title: Requests
requests_total.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey), stepNorm = coalesce(json.stepName, additionalfields.stepName, json.serviceName, additionalfields.serviceName, "unknown")
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{stepNorm}, bins:60
| fields timeframe, interval, step = stepNorm, requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc
| limit 100

requests_failed.title: Failed Requests
requests_failed.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey), stepNorm = coalesce(json.stepName, additionalfields.stepName, json.serviceName, additionalfields.serviceName, "unknown")
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| makeTimeseries errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), by:{stepNorm}, bins:60
| fields timeframe, interval, step = stepNorm, errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

requests_success_vs_failed.title: Requests - Success vs Failed
requests_success_vs_failed.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey)
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| makeTimeseries total = count(), failed = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), bins:60
| fieldsAdd success = total[] - failed[]
| fields timeframe, interval, success, failed

requests_key_requests.title: Requests - Key Requests
requests_key_requests.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey), endpointNorm = coalesce(additionalfields.endpointName, additionalfields.endpoint, json.endpointName, json.endpoint, json.stepName, additionalfields.stepName, "unknown")
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| filter endpointNorm != "NON_KEY_REQUESTS"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{endpointNorm}, bins:60
| fields timeframe, interval, endpoint = endpointNorm, requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc
| limit 100

latency_p50.title: Latency_p50
latency_p50.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey), stepNorm = coalesce(json.stepName, additionalfields.stepName, json.serviceName, additionalfields.serviceName, "unknown"), durationMs = toDouble(coalesce(additionalfields.processingTime, additionalfields.durationMs, additionalfields.responseTime, additionalfields.latencyMs))
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| filter isNotNull(durationMs)
| makeTimeseries latency_p50 = percentile(durationMs, 50), by:{stepNorm}, bins:60
| fields timeframe, interval, step = stepNorm, latency_p50
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p50) desc
| limit 100

latency_p90.title: Latency_p90
latency_p90.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey), stepNorm = coalesce(json.stepName, additionalfields.stepName, json.serviceName, additionalfields.serviceName, "unknown"), durationMs = toDouble(coalesce(additionalfields.processingTime, additionalfields.durationMs, additionalfields.responseTime, additionalfields.latencyMs))
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| filter isNotNull(durationMs)
| makeTimeseries latency_p90 = percentile(durationMs, 90), by:{stepNorm}, bins:60
| fields timeframe, interval, step = stepNorm, latency_p90
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p90) desc
| limit 100

latency_p99.title: Latency_p99
latency_p99.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey), stepNorm = coalesce(json.stepName, additionalfields.stepName, json.serviceName, additionalfields.serviceName, "unknown"), durationMs = toDouble(coalesce(additionalfields.processingTime, additionalfields.durationMs, additionalfields.responseTime, additionalfields.latencyMs))
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| filter isNotNull(durationMs)
| makeTimeseries latency_p99 = percentile(durationMs, 99), by:{stepNorm}, bins:60
| fields timeframe, interval, step = stepNorm, latency_p99
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p99) desc
| limit 100

errors_5xx.title: 5xx Errors
errors_5xx.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey), stepNorm = coalesce(json.stepName, additionalfields.stepName, json.serviceName, additionalfields.serviceName, "unknown"), statusCode = toLong(coalesce(additionalfields.httpStatusCode, additionalfields.statusCode, json.httpStatusCode, json.statusCode))
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| makeTimeseries errors = countIf(statusCode >= 500 and statusCode <= 599), by:{stepNorm}, bins:60
| fields timeframe, interval, step = stepNorm, errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

errors_4xx.title: 4xx Errors
errors_4xx.query:
fetch bizevents
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd companyNameNorm = coalesce(json.companyName, json.company, additionalfields.companyName, additionalfields.company, event.provider), journeyTypeNorm = coalesce(json.journeyType, json.journeyTypeName, json.journey, additionalfields.journeyType, additionalfields.journeyTypeName, additionalfields.journey), stepNorm = coalesce(json.stepName, additionalfields.stepName, json.serviceName, additionalfields.serviceName, "unknown"), statusCode = toLong(coalesce(additionalfields.httpStatusCode, additionalfields.statusCode, json.httpStatusCode, json.statusCode))
| filter companyNameNorm == $CompanyName
| filter in(journeyTypeNorm, $JourneyType)
| makeTimeseries errors = countIf(statusCode >= 400 and statusCode <= 499), by:{stepNorm}, bins:60
| fields timeframe, interval, step = stepNorm, errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

cpu_usage.title: CPU Usage %

memory_usage.title: Memory Used

gc_suspension_time.title: GC Suspension Time
gc_suspension_time.query:
timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.jvm.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.smartscape.process},
           filter: in(dt.smartscape.process, array($PGI))       
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.clr.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.smartscape.process}, filter: in(dt.smartscape.process, array($PGI))]
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.go.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.smartscape.process}, filter: in(dt.smartscape.process, array($PGI))]
| append [timeseries gc_time = avg(dt.runtime.nodejs.gc.suspension_time),
           by:{dt.smartscape.process}, filter: in(dt.smartscape.process, array($PGI))]
| lookup [smartscapeNodes PROCESS | fields id, name], sourceField:dt.smartscape.process, lookupField:id, fields:{name}
| fields timeframe, interval, process = name, gc_time
| sort arrayAvg(gc_time) desc
| limit 100
